general.title: Discord Quest Helper
general.subtitle: Dashboard for managing your Discord Quests
general.login_prompt: Login with your Discord account to start managing your quests.

home.dashboard_desc: Start with the recommended action, then inspect quests only when you need more control.
home.pending_claim_reminder: {count} quest(s) completed and awaiting claim in Discord.
home.exe_select_desc: {game} has multiple executables. Please select which one to simulate:
home.custom_exe_desc: {game} has no known executables in Discord's database. Please enter a custom process name to simulate.
home.empty_recommended: No immediate action needed. You can view all quests or refresh.
home.empty_ready_to_run: No accepted quests are ready to run.
home.empty_ready_to_claim: No completed quests are waiting for claim.
home.include_expired_desc: Show expired entries for inspection and recovery.
home.claim_navigated: Discord has been redirected to the quest page. Please claim your reward there.
home.next_blocked_desc: You can try refreshing after {time}. Current quests remain visible below.
home.next_active_desc: Let it continue, or stop it if you need to change modes or recover.
home.next_queue_desc: Queued quests will run one by one. You can stop the queue at any time.
home.next_claim_desc: Recommended: claim "{name}" before starting new work.
home.next_run_desc: Recommended: start "{name}" because it is already accepted and startable.
home.next_accept_desc: Recommended: accept "{name}" so it can be completed later.
home.next_empty_desc: Refresh to fetch the latest Discord quests for this account.
home.next_done_desc: There is no immediate quest action waiting right now.
home.activity_launch_desc: This quest requires launching a Discord Activity. The following steps will be performed:
home.activity_launch_step1: Navigate to the quest page in Discord
home.activity_launch_step2: Click 'Launch Quest' in Discord to open the Activity
home.activity_launch_step3: Complete any authorization prompts in Discord
home.activity_launch_step4: Return here and click 'Start Quest' to begin
home.activity_navigate_error: Failed to navigate Discord to quest page. Please open Discord manually and go to the Quests page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.control_center_desc: Check account health, completion behavior, Discord integration, diagnostics, and advanced internals from one place.
settings.recommend_account: Connect an account before managing quests.
settings.recommend_integration: Discord Client is not connected. CDP mode and Activity quests require it.
settings.account_desc: Connect the Discord account used for quests.
settings.advanced_login_desc: Manual token entry is available for recovery or unusual setups.
settings.token_storage_note: Tokens are stored locally by the app and should not be shared.
settings.quest_behavior_desc: Choose the completion mode and adjust normal quest timing.
settings.game_polling_hint: Polling interval for querying quest progress
settings.display_desc: Optional account-level information shown on the Home page.
settings.show_orbs_balance_desc: Fetches virtual currency balance on login and when manually refreshed.
settings.game_mode_simulate_desc: Starts a lightweight simulated game process.
settings.game_mode_cdp_desc: Injects into Discord client via CDP. Works for all games. Requires Discord with debug port enabled.
settings.game_mode_cdp_unavailable: CDP not available. Start Discord with --remote-debugging-port.
settings.cache_desc: The application uses the Documents folder to store some cache files (e.g. simulated games).
settings.about_desc: A tool to help complete Discord quests automatically.
settings.about_warning: Warning: Using this tool may violate Discord's Terms of Service. Use at your own risk.
settings.check_prerelease_desc: Include pre-release versions when checking for updates.
settings.diagnostics_desc: Export application logs for troubleshooting issues.
settings.diagnostics_info: Logs are automatically sanitized to remove sensitive data like tokens and personal information. Only logs from this session are included.
settings.cdp_desc: Connect to the Discord client for accurate client data. Launch or restart Discord with CDP from here.
settings.cdp_disconnected: Not connected - Start Discord with debug flag
settings.cdp_sync: Sync Discord Client Info via CDP
settings.custom_port_desc: Keep the default unless Discord was launched with a different debug port.
settings.cdp_launch_desc: Start Discord with the CDP debugging port. If Discord is already running, a confirmation will be shown before restarting.
settings.cdp_dialog_desc_disconnected: Discord is running but CDP is not connected. We need to restart Discord with the CDP debug port enabled.
settings.cdp_dialog_desc_connected: Discord is already connected via CDP. Restarting will briefly disconnect and relaunch the client.
settings.cdp_shortcut_desc: Create a long-lived desktop shortcut that launches the current Discord version with CDP enabled.
settings.cdp_shortcut_success: CDP launcher shortcut created on Desktop
settings.client_emulation_desc: Current client identity used for API requests. Sync via CDP for the most accurate values.
settings.super_props_mode_desc: Advanced request identity source used by API calls.
settings.tooltip_cdp_3: Video quests run at real-time speed (server enforced)
settings.tooltip_simulate_1: Spawns a lightweight fake game process
settings.tooltip_heartbeat_3: No process simulation, but not recommended
settings.video_config_cdp_notice: These settings are not used in CDP mode. CDP mode sends progress directly via Discord's internal API.
settings.activity_cdp_required: Activity quests require CDP mode. Enable CDP in the Discord Client Integration section above.
settings.activity_timing_advanced_desc: Only adjust these values when activity quests need a different checkpoint cadence.
settings.advanced_desc: Implementation details for ports, cache paths, developer mode, and legacy recovery.
settings.developer_mode_desc: Unlocked from the About section for debug tools.
settings.debug_unlock_hint: You are {steps} steps away from being a developer.
settings.disable_debug_confirm_desc: The Debug tab and developer tools will be hidden. You can re-enable it by tapping the version number 7 times.

version.update_desc: Version {version} is now available. You are currently on {current}.

game_sim.title: Game Simulator
game_sim.select_game: Select a game from the list to start
game_sim.config_desc: Configure and run the simulated game.
game_sim.no_exe_hint: This game has no known executables in Discord's database. You can enter a custom process name to simulate.
game_sim.no_exe_custom_warning: An incorrect process name may not be detected by Discord.
game_sim.custom_config_desc: Enter any executable name to simulate a custom process.
game_sim.custom_exe_hint: The process name Discord will detect. Include the extension on Windows (e.g. game.exe).
game_sim.create_dialog_desc: This will write a standalone simulated process executable to a folder on your disk. You can run it later independently of this app to trigger Discord game detection.
game_sim.create_dialog_path_hint: The executable will be saved as "<save path>/<executable name>".
game_sim.run_success_rpc: Simulated game is running with RPC!
game_sim.showing_top: Showing top {count} games. Search to find more.

account.select_desc: Found multiple valid Discord tokens. Please select which account to use:

dialog.accept_quests_desc: Accept {count} quests? This action will enroll you in these quests.
dialog.complete_quests_desc: Add {count} video quests to the completion queue? This will process them one by one.
dialog.complete_game_desc: Add {count} game quests to the completion queue? This will process them one by one.
dialog.complete_all_desc: Add {count} quests to the completion queue? This will process them one by one.
dialog.activity_excluded_notice: Activity quests require manual interaction and will not be auto-completed.

debug.title: Debug Information
debug.description: View program parameters and configuration values
debug.super_properties_desc: Request header properties sent to Discord API
debug.runner_desc: Game simulation runner binary embedded in the application
debug.captured_headers_desc: Intercept all Discord client HTTP requests via CDP Network and collect header statistics
debug.capture_hint: Requires Discord running with debug flag. Click Capture to collect all HTTP request headers for the specified duration.
debug.request_no_match: No requests match the current filter.
debug.decoder_desc: Decode base64-encoded x-super-properties header to view the JSON payload.
debug.header_profile_desc: Resolved request identity and locale headers used by API calls.
debug.quest_api_baseline_desc: Observed Quest-related endpoints from the current CDP network capture.
debug.quest_api_baseline_empty: Capture headers from Discord with CDP to populate the Quest API baseline.
debug.quest_placement_decisions_desc: Fetches diagnostics only. Does not affect the main quest list.

toast.stream_quest_desc: Stream quests require you to stream the game on Discord manually. Start a stream in a voice channel, then use the Game Simulator to simulate the game.
